scripts.build:wasm:sql.js: rm -rf ./node_modules/sql.js && mkdir -p node_modules/sql.js && cd node_modules/sql.js && git clone git@github.com:sql-js/sql.js.git . && cp ../../scripts/sqlite/Makefile.txt . && npm run build && mkdir -p ../../lib/sqlite && cp ./dist/*.js ../../lib/sqlite
scripts.build:wasm:flatbuffers: rm -rf ./node_modules/flatbuffers && mkdir -p node_modules/flatbuffers && cd node_modules/flatbuffers && git clone git@github.com:google/flatbuffers.git . && cd ../../scripts/flatbuffers && chmod +x ./build.sh && bash build.sh
scripts.build:wasm:flatbuffers2: cd src/flatbuffers/ && rm -rf build && mkdir -p build && cd build &&emmake cmake .. -DCMAKE_CXX_FLAGS="--no-entry -s SINGLE_FILE -s EXPORT_ES6=1 -s EXPORT_ALL=1 -s EXTRA_EXPORTED_RUNTIME_METHODS='["cwrap"]' -s RELOCATABLE=1 -v -g -Qunused-arguments -fno-exceptions" && emmake make && mv flatbuffer_wrapper ../flatbuffers.mjs
